sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS PROFESSIONAL FOOTBALL.  FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLER'S FAVORITE PRO FOOTBALL TEAM AND WHERE IT'S HEADED THIS YEAR.       DO YOU AGREE WITH THE CALLER'S PREDICTION?
turns: Hi, how's it going? What team do you like the most in pro football?
Oh, um, tough question. Probably the Dallas Cowboys.
That's cool, why do you like them? Is there a particular player or something they've done that stands out for you?
Um, well I've always liked their history, you know? They've got a lot of iconic players and moments, and just being around since the early days of the NFL makes them kinda special to me.
Yeah, definitely agree with that. Legacy teams like the Cowboys and Packers have a lot of tradition and fans all around the country.
Do you have a favorite team, or...?
Yeah, I'm more into the New England Patriots. Always have been.

Oh, interesting choice." (said in a neutral tone)

Now, continue the conversation by having ParticipantA respond to ParticipantB'sgreeting
Great, nice to meet you! How has your day been so far?
It's been good, thanks. Just finishing up work for the day.
Oh, same here, wrapping up some assignments before the weekend.

Any big plans for the weekend?"

(The other participant will then reply, continuing the conversation.)
Going to catch up on some reading. Maybe watch a game later tonight.
Yeah, I might do that too. Depends on what the Cowboys are up against.

What game are you planning on watching?" (friendly interest)

(This completes the example response, which should be combined with ParticipantB's next line to make a coherent whole.)
Probably the Monday Night Football game between the Chiefs and Chargers.
Oh, that sounds exciting. Kansas City's had a strong season so far, but I heard the Chargers have been playing better lately.
So, do you think either team has a clear advantage heading into that matchup?
It's hard to say. Both teams have their strengths and weaknesses, so it could go either way.
Yeah, totally. It's gonna be a great game to watch.
Yeah, I'm looking forward to it." (enthusiastic)
Yeah, me too. Anything can happen in football, right?
Yeah, especially in the playoffs. It's anyone's game.
Definitely. You never know who's gonna come out on top until the very end.
That's true, anything can change quickly during a game." (reflective)
So, let's talk about our predictions for the Super Bowl. Who do you think has the best chance at winning it all?
I'd say the Chiefs have a good shot at making it to the Super Bowl again this year, but it's a tough call.
I think the Patriots have a solid roster too, but they'll face stiff competition from teams like the Buffalo Bills and Miami Dolphins in their division.
Yeah, the Bills have been playing really well this season.
